articles.title: From Hormuz to Resin: How the Iran Conflict Is Resetting Polymer Pricing
articles.description: Polymer markets have shifted from traditional supply-demand pricing to geopolitical risk-driven dynamics as Middle East conflicts disrupt petrochemical flows through the Strait of Hormuz. From February to May 2026, plastics prices reached multi-year highs, with naphtha margins surging and regional impacts varying from contract repricing in Europe to transaction-based increases in Asia and India, fundamentally reshaping global resin cost structures.
articles.summary: Polymer markets have shifted from traditional supply-demand pricing to geopolitical risk-driven dynamics as Middle East conflicts disrupt petrochemica...

articles.title: Lignin-based epoxy resins approach viability for metal coatings
articles.description: Researchers have developed fully lignin-based epoxy resin systems for metal coating applications that deliver reliable adhesion, impact resistance and durability – positioning depolymerised lignin as a scalable, bio-based alternative to bisphenol-derived resins.

articles.title: Functionalised aluminium oxide enhances corrosion resistance of epoxy coatings on mild steel

articles.title: Sustainable anti-corrosion coating systems for steel bridges

articles.title: Living Plastics Self-Destruct on Command Using Engineered Bacteria
articles.description: Researchers have developed living plastics that self-destruct on command by embedding engineered Bacillus subtilis bacteria producing two cooperative enzymes. The material completely degrades polycaprolactone polymer into base building blocks within six days without creating microplastics.

articles.title: Harmonized System Changes Could Reshape US Plastics Trade
articles.description: Proposed amendments to the Harmonized System could affect $24.3 billion in US plastics trade by 2028. articles.description: A new polydopamine-modified graphene (PDA-G) filler significantly enhances the adhesion, dispersibility, and corrosion resistance of waterborne zinc-rich epoxy coatings (WZEP).
